title: Scary Minecraft
description: Scary Minecraft is a vanilla-like, lightweight, immersion and horror focused modpack.
body:
Scary Minecraft is a vanilla-like, lightweight, and immersion and horror focused modpack. Designed to be best played with others, Scary Minecraft keeps the familiar vanilla feel while subtly immersing players with carefully selected mods to enhance the atmosphere, gameplay, immersion, performance, and terror.

The world above and underground are more diverse, vastly detailed, and immersive with generation overhauls and ambient sounds. Days and nights last longer creating more tension.

Experience chilling ambiaace with mods like "The Man From The Fog" and "True Darkness," making caves pitch black and every step you take during night fraught with tension. Avoid the beady eyes of the "Cave Dweller" as you explore winding caves, underground forests, and deep dark rivers

Realistic and spine chilling audio with "Enhanced Audio" and "Sound Physics Remastered" provide a 3D soundscape that makes every creak, footstep, and screech feel eerily real. Hear your friends' voices bounce off cave walls with proximity voice chat. Hear thunder crack in the distance, echoing through the sky and the pouring rain.
